description: Aida watches over the unconscious Agent May, keeping her imprisoned as she removes evidence of her own violent acts. Aida reassures May (who is still unconscious) that she must stay hidden until her replacement serves its purpose. This establishes Aida's secret and dangerous agenda, setting the ominous tone for the episode.
location: Dr. Holden Radcliffe's house (New York / Radcliffe lab)

transcript.line: I'll play you music when I can. Studies show that listening to music increases dopamine levels by 9%. And I'll arrange for more comfortable accommodations eventually. But I must keep you hidden, a secret until your substitute has served her purpose. So, unfortunately, you'll have to stay here for now.
